title: 10 best herbal teas for chronic bronchitis
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas helps with chronic bronchitis because its anti-inflammatory properties soothe and calm the inflamed airways, reducing congestion and coughing. The tea's expectorant properties help loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, making it easier to breathe. Additionally, Glycyrrhiza glabra's natural compounds, such as glycyrrhizin, have been shown to have antimicrobial properties that help combat underlying infections that may be contributing to the bronchitis.
